PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Dec-07-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration With Will Annexed. The will dated Nov-17-2002 is admitted to probate. Laura Kiffmeyer is appointed Administrator of the Estate with will annexed, with full authority. Bond is fixed at $1,128,000. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Jan-08-2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
